name: invoice
subject: Invoice {{invoice_number}} from {{company_name}}
body_html:
INVOICE

#{{invoice_number}}

Dear {{client_name}},

Thank you for your business. Please find your invoice below.

Invoice Details

Invoice Number: {{invoice_number}}

Date: {{invoice_date}}

Due Date: {{due_date}}

Amount Due: {{currency}} {{total}}

You can view and pay your invoice online:

Pay Now

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
{{company_name}}

{{company_name}} | {{company_email}} | {{company_phone}}

This email was sent to {{client_email}}
